{'sql': 'SELECT 
    cm.Id AS maker_id,
    cm.FullName AS maker_full_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT mn.Model) AS number_of_car_models
FROM 
    car_makers cm
LEFT JOIN 
    model_list mn ON cm.Id = mn.Maker
GROUP BY 
    cm.Id, cm.FullName
ORDER BY 
    number_of_car_models DESC;'}

inputs.sql:
SELECT 
    cm.Id AS maker_id,
    cm.FullName AS maker_full_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT mn.Model) AS number_of_car_models
FROM 
    car_makers cm
LEFT JOIN 
    model_list mn ON cm.Id = mn.Maker
GROUP BY 
    cm.Id, cm.FullName
ORDER BY 
    number_of_car_models DESC;

    cm.Id AS maker_id,
    cm.FullName AS maker_full_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT mn.Model) AS number_of_car_models
FROM 
    car_makers cm
LEFT JOIN 
    model_list mn ON cm.Id = mn.Maker
GROUP BY 
    cm.Id, cm.FullName
ORDER BY 
    number_of_car_models DESC;"}

SELECT 
    cm.Id AS maker_id,
    cm.FullName AS maker_full_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT mn.Model) AS number_of_car_models
FROM 
    car_makers cm
LEFT JOIN 
    model_list mn ON cm.Id = mn.Maker
GROUP BY 
    cm.Id, cm.FullName
ORDER BY 
    number_of_car_models DESC;
